title: Halloween Shabby Rag Garland - Handmade, Fabric, Banner
description:
🎃Halloween Shabby Rag Garland Banner

💡The spider web fabric features a glow in the dark effect that activates when exposed to bright light.  Direct sunlight or shining a black light on the spider web fabric is a fast way to charge up the fabric to glow. 

🕸️Add a festive touch to your Halloween and fall decor with this handmade shabby rag garland.  Made with soft fabric strips and a relaxed, raw edge style, this garland is perfect for mantles, parties, and seasonal decorating!

✨Details:
-Sold individually.  Length options are available from the dropdown menu before adding to cart
-Handmade with high quality quilting cotton
-Raw edges and frayed fabric strips are intentional and part of the shabby design

📏Size Options
◾6 Foot Banner:
-Banner length: Approximately 72 inches of fabric strips (6 feet) 
-Additional string on each end for hanging.
-Strips hang down approximately 4 inches

◾5 Foot Banner
-Banner length: Approximately 60 inches of fabric strips (5 feet) 
-Additional string on each end for hanging.
-Strips hang down approximately 4 inches

◾4 Foot Banner
-Banner length: Approximately 48 inches of fabric strips (4 feet) 
-Additional string on each end for hanging.
-Strips hang down approximately 4 inches

📌Please note:
-This is a handmade item and measurements may vary slightly
-Colors may appear slightly different depending on screen settings.
-The garland you will receive will have all fabric seen in the picture, the order may differ.  

🧼Care:
-Spot clean only
-Packed with care.  Fluffing and refreshing may be needed upon arrival.  
-To refresh: mist with water, iron/steam, or hang to help with wrinkles.  DO NOT iron the spider web fabric or pom poms.  The other fabric can be ironed or steamed.

✅Safety:  
-This is a decorative item only
-Keep out of reach of children
-Remove banners near fireplaces before lighting a fire.  

Made in a pet free and smoke free home.

🌵Made with Love
💓Thanks for looking!
